title: Choritaenia
taxonomy: Choritaenia is classified in the family Euphorbiaceae and is a genus of flowering plants. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Choritaenia is based on its botanical characteristics and morphology. Choritaenia is a part of the larger group of plants known as Euphorbiaceae, which includes around 300 genera. The classification of Choritaenia is still evolving as new research emerges.
